title: Darwinia uncinata

Darwinia uncinata is classified in the genus Darwinia, which consists of small shrubs native to Western Australia. This species is part of the tribe Colletopteridiinae. The classification of Darwinia uncinata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Rhamnaceae family.
